live_migration_support_notes: No general native CDC surface; migration is snapshot/export with final source pause unless a configured append/file manifest or proxy-observed write path is admitted.
initial_snapshot_or_seed: EXPORT DATABASE, COPY/Parquet/CSV/Arrow export, or database copy after checkpoint
delta_feed_or_change_capture: no general native CDC; only configured append/file manifests or query polling windows
proxy_method: SQL/API proxy with relation/file-scan readiness routing
alternate_or_fallback: proxy-observed writes plus final write pause; otherwise snapshot-only migration
required_cutover_barrier: source checkpoint/final pause complete; file manifests stable; attached databases and external scans mapped or refused
parser_worker_scope: parse reference migration commands/wire/API messages; classify route; render reference diagnostics; no execution/finality authority
sbup_role_a_scope: trusted Role A bridge/proxy/source connector after engine admission; normalizes source events to ReferenceLiveIngestEventRecord; invokes admitted SBLR/internal procedures only
engine_mga_rule: destination ScratchBird MGA owns target commit visibility rollback recovery cutover evidence; reference feed tokens are evidence only
proof_tests: project/tests reference regression original baseline emulation steady-state active live-migration proxy mirror crash-restart idempotent replay rollback cutover performance and support bundle proofs
